raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tee dewe to teem
Strahdneekeem/ ka tee ar to ta
KUNGA Nammu stiprnatu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un no teem Wihreem/
kam ta Nauda dohta tappe/ ka
tee to teem Strahdneekeim doh-
tu/ ne tappe Lahgadiba waiz-
ta/ jo tee darrija to peetizzigi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta Nauda no teem No-
Gr seedfibus-Uppureem/ un ta Nan-
da no teem Grehku-Uppureem ne
tappe eekſch ta KUNGA Nam-
ma nesta/ ta peenahze teem
Preestereem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "To Brihdi zehlahs Asa-
els to Sihreu kehninsch / un
karroja prett Gattu / un uſneh-
me to. Pehz greesehs Asaëls
prett Jerusalemi zeltees/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet Joas tas Kehninsch
no Juha nehme wiſſas eefweh-
titas Leetas/ ko winna Tehwi
Josawats/ un Jorams/ un Aka-
sijus tee Kehnixti no Juha bij
eefwehtiſsch/ ir tahs Leetas/ ko
wiſſch pats bij eefwehtijs / un
wiſſu Seltu/ kas eekſch ta KUN-
GA Namma/ un eekſch ta keh-
nixa Namma Mantahm atrasts
tappe/ un tuhttija to Asaëtam to
Sihreu Kehnixam. Tad zeh-
lehs wiſſch nohſt no Jerusalemes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kas wehl no Joafa
ti eedusinojahs pahr Israëln/ un
Leetahm atteek/ un wiſſo wiſſch
ier darrijs / tas irr rakstihts to
Kehnixu no Juha Laiku-Grah-
matā.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un winna Kalpi zehlahs/
un darrija weenu Derribu / un
kawe Joafu Miflus Namma/
kur eets tohp us Sillu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo Josakars Sineata
Dehls/ un Josabats Someza
Dehls winna Kalpi kawe to/ ka
tas nomirre. Un tee aprakke
winnu pee winna Tehweemi Dah-
wida Pilli. Un winna Dehls
Amazijus tappe par Kehniau
winna Weeta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Iwideſmits treschā
Gaddā Joafa Akasijus
Dehla ta Kehnixa no
Juha / tappe Joāās Jeūfa
Dehls par Kehnixu pahr Isra-
elu eekſch Samarijas feptinpa-
defimits Gaddus/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiſſch darrija kas tam
KUNGAM ne patikfe/ jo wiſſch
staigaja Jerobeama Neebata
Debla Grehkeem pakkat/ kas Is-
sraëlu grehkoht darrija/ no teem
wiſſch ne atstahjabs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapehz tas KUNGS toh-
dewe tohs Asaëtam to Sihreu
Kehnixam / un Ben-Adadam
Asaëta Dehlain Rohka/ wiſſā
Latka.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
